title: lelya prostrata
intro: Lelya prostrata, a type of flowering plant, is commonly known as the Western Yarrow or Common Yarrow. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Lelya prostrata include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a natural antihistamine. Herbal preparations of Lelya prostrata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
